lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Added GANZZAHL_ERWEITERT to support extended integer types (Long).
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added GANZZAHL_ERWEITERT to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Added BINARY to support binary data types.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added BINARY to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Added VERSION to support version columns.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added VERSION to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Added ZEITPUNKT_LETZTE_AENDERUNG to track last modification timestamps.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added ZEITPUNKT_LETZTE_AENDERUNG to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Added ZEITPUNKT_ERSTELLUNG to track creation timestamps.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added ZEITPUNKT_ERSTELLUNG to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Added ERSTELLT_VON to track the creator of an entity.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added ERSTELLT_VON to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Added MODIFIZIERT_VON to track the modifier of an entity.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added MODIFIZIERT_VON to the Datentyp enum.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Replaced the deprecated StringUtils.equals with the modern Strings.CS.equals from Apache Commons Lang3.
Removed unused import of Apache Commons Lang3 StringUtils.
Made the class implement the EntitaetreferenzIf interface to enforce contract compliance.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Changed class declaration to 'public class Entitaet implements EntitaetreferenzIf'

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Added a new field to support database index configuration on the entity.
Removed helper methods for string capitalization that relied on the removed dependency.
Added a method to return an Entitaetreferenz object, likely required by the new interface.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Added getEntitaetreferenz() method returning a built Entitaetreferenz

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: The class now implements the EntitaetreferenzIf interface to adhere to a new architectural contract.
Added a fetchType field with a default value to control JPA fetching behavior.
Added a cascadeType field with a default value to control JPA cascading behavior.
Added a new boolean field 'fachlichEindeutig' to the Entitaetsfeld class to support business uniqueness constraints.
Added a new boolean field 'alsTabelle' to the Entitaetsfeld class to support table-like representation.
Reformatted field declarations to align assignment operators for improved readability.
lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: public final boolean optional = false; -> public final boolean optional = false;

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the class rename from MaskenEntitaetsfeld to Entitaetsfeld.
Change the type of parameterFelder field from MaskenEntitaetsfeld to Entitaetsfeld to match the renamed class.
Change the type of tabellendefinitionParameterFelder field from MaskenEntitaetsfeld to Entitaetsfeld to match the renamed class.

lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Migrate assertion import from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.
Replace UI-specific domain classes with generic domain classes.
Update builder method names to match new domain class structure.
Update TypeScript import source package name.
Replace JUnit 4 static import with JUnit 5 equivalent to align with the test framework migration.
Remove imports for UI model classes that are no longer used in the test after refactoring.
lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Removed imports for Checkbox, Dropdown, MaskeGridItems, UiModelReact

lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Rename test method to better reflect its purpose of testing the domain model generation.
Rename helper method from 'uimodellErzeugen' to 'domainErzeugen' to match the new focus on domain model creation.
Remove UI-specific model construction (Checkbox, Dropdown, etc.) from the test to focus solely on the DomainModel structure.
lowcode.model/src/test/java/de/zeb/lowco.human_impl: Removed Checkbox, Dropdown, MaskeGridItems, and UiModelReact builder calls; kept only DomainModel and LowCodeModel builders.

lowcode.model/pom.xml.general_idea: Refactor module to inherit configuration from a parent POM instead of defining it locally.
Remove explicit version for Lombok to inherit it from the parent POM.
Remove explicit version for Gson to inherit it from the parent POM.
Remove explicit version for Commons Lang3 to inherit it from the parent POM.
Remove explicit version for Commons IO to inherit it from the parent POM.
Switch JUnit dependency from engine to api artifact to align with standard JUnit 5 structure.
Remove explicit version for JUnit Jupiter API to inherit it from the parent POM.
Remove deprecated JUnit Platform Runner dependency which is no longer needed for JUnit 5.
Update JUnit Engine dependency to use the correct artifact ID and remove version.
Remove explicit version for EqualsVerifier to inherit it from the parent POM.
Remove local maven-compiler-plugin configuration to inherit Java version and annotation processor settings from parent.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added Eclipse-specific project files (.DS_Store, .classpath, .project, .settings) to the gitignore to prevent IDE metadata from being tracked.
Added Maven build output directory and release properties file to the gitignore to exclude generated build artifacts.
